semantic.role: Protocol type definition defining the shape of a file status snapshot for use across the ArchSpine scanning and synchronization layers.
responsibilities: Define the data contract for capturing file modification time and size, consumed by scanners, aggregators, and manifest utilities.
Provide a stable TypeScript interface that external modules depend on for type safety when tracking file state changes.
outOfScope: File I/O, reading actual file system metadata.
Validation or transformation of mtime/size values.
Business logic related to change detection.
invariants: The interface must remain a pure value type with no methods; consumers should treat instances as immutable data.
Any consumer that derives change detection from mtime and size must base its logic solely on the fields defined here.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish a clean type contract for file status snapshots to decouple scanning from change detection logic.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of ArchSpine v1.0.0 release introducing a governed type system for semantic layer and architectural governance.

publicSurface.description: Data interface representing the immutable state of a file at a point in time (modification timestamp and byte size). Used by the scanner and aggregator to track file changes.
